info.title: Peakly API
info.description:
# Peakly API

The Peakly API provides programmatic access to invoicing, customers, products, and more.

## Authentication

Authenticate using an API key in the `X-API-Key` header:
```
X-API-Key: pk_...
```

API keys are scoped to an organization — the organization context is resolved automatically from the key.

Create and manage API keys via the `/v1/api-keys` endpoints.

categoryId.description: Product category ID; null/0 may resolve to Sin Rubro

unitPrice.description: Default unit price for auto-populating receipt lines
Default unit price for auto-populating receipt lines

error.description: SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE enum-style error code. Always machine-mappable. Examples: AFIP_PERSONA_NOT_FOUND, AFIP_WSCI_ERROR, INVALID_CUIT, DB_UNIQUE_VIOLATION, NOT_FOUND, BAD_REQUEST, UNAUTHORIZED.

message.example: No AFIP taxpayer found for CUIT 20999999999.
message.description: Developer-friendly English description of the error. Always present.

providerMessage.example: No existe persona con ese Id
providerMessage.description: Raw message from the upstream provider (AFIP, etc.) with envelope noise stripped. Present on errors that wrap a third-party failure; kept in the provider's original language.

code.description: Numeric AFIP error code (e.g. 10016 for already-authorized). Only present on AFIP errors that carry a numeric code.

details.description: Field-level validation reasons. Populated for validation errors and structured business errors.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of when the error occurred.

path.description: Request path that triggered the error.

requestId.description: pino-http request ID for log correlation.

createCreditNote.description: Auto-create a compensating credit note for the full amount (default: true)

receiptIds.description: Array of sales receipt UUIDs to email (1–200)
Array of sales receipt UUIDs to generate PDFs for (1–100)
Array of sales receipt UUIDs to void (1–50)
Array of sales receipt UUIDs to mark as fully collected (1–200)

serviceStartDate.description: Service period start date (required for service organizations)

serviceEndDate.description: Service period end date (required for service organizations)

isDraft.description: Create as draft (BORRADOR) without triggering AFIP

exportData.description: Export-specific data for WSFEX invoices (e.g. incoterms)
Export-specific data for WSFEX invoices (draft only)

details.description: Replace all detail lines atomically (draft only)

ignoresTaxes.description: Skip tax calculations for this customer
